title: Yoinky Sploinky
description: A mod pack full of QoL and performance mods with some feature mods that shouldn't break the balance of the game.
body:
### A mod pack full of QoL and performance mods with some feature mods that shouldn't break the balance of the game.
> 6144MB/6GB of RAM recomended!

This mod pack has a plethora of QoL mods, Performance mods, Visual/Audio, Tech mods, magic, and world gen ... This pack has a little bit of everything!

The main goal of this pack is to improve upon the boring vanilla Minecraft experience while still providing content mods to deepen everyone's progression. I've tried my best not to add in TOO many content mods so as to not overwhelm newer players in the modding scene. Mainly, we have Create (and a lot of add-ons), cooking and food mods, and AE2, Toms simple storage at the time of writing (v1.1.0). This pack also contains some dimension overhauls and additional content to the deep dark via Deeper Darker.

This pack is mainly used for me and a group of friends to mess around with, though I am open to suggestions on how to improve this pack! I intend on making a quest book in the future that guides people through a relative progression (mainly all of create then working into an AE2 setup).
